news.summary: In Baltimore, the top digital real estate brokerage firm, Name Experts, disclosed their exclusive acquisition of two highly valuable domain names: Eight.com and Fate.com. news.summary: A new partnership has been revealed between Artha, a wealth management platform focusing on portfolio management, and Nitrogen, a top developer of software for advisors. The collaboration will offer Nitrogen users access to a portfolio optimization tool developed by Artha. This tool enables users to enhance their existing client portfolios and models directly. It combines Nitrogen's integrated risk tolerance, proposal generation, investment research, and planning software with Artha's cutting-edge technology. This partnership aims to provide advisors with advanced tools to better serve their clients.
news.headline: Artha partners with Nitrogen to offer portfolio optimization tool, enhancing advisor capabilities.

news.summary: A prominent consumer cybersecurity services provider, IPVanish, has introduced a time-limited offer until August 31, 2025. Under this promotion, individuals who opt for the Yearly or 2-Year IPVanish Advanced Plan will be gifted a 3GB eSIM data package worth $11. This bonus facilitates secure and instantaneous mobile connectivity across more than 200 countries globally. The initiative aims to cater to the needs of global travelers by offering reliable mobile internet access along with robust online security.
news.headline: IPVanish offers free 3GB eSIM to new subscribers of Yearly or 2-Year Advanced Plan until Aug 31, 2025, providing secure mobile connectivity in 200+ countries.

news.summary: A prominent information technology solutions provider, Connection (NASDAQ: CNXN), based in Merrimack, N.H., has recently been honored as the Samsung National Partner of the Year 2024. This recognition stems from their outstanding performance in delivering value to clients, surpassing set goals in all product categories, and achieving an impressive 267% growth year-over-year. Connection caters to business, government, healthcare, and education sectors. Tim McGrath expressed pleasure in receiving this prestigious award.

The company unveiled significant platform upgrades to empower healthcare organizations in delivering impactful consumer experiences. Additionally, mPulse has been advocating for enhancements to improve the digital engagement landscape in the healthcare sector.

news.summary: In Heredia, Costa Rica, SurveyMonkey, the leading platform for surveys and forms globally, revealed the launch of its latest office. This expansion is facilitated by the country’s proficient workforce and advantageous position, catering to customers in North and South America. Situated in the Cariari Corporate Center in Ulloa, Heredia, the new office marks a strategic move for SurveyMonkey to establish a worldwide team that resonates with and caters to its diverse clientele.

news.summary: A correction has been issued by Mersana Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRSN) regarding an error in the previous release. The Median OS in the first table was mistakenly reported as 1.7 months; the accurate value is 5.7 months.
news.headline: Mersana Therapeutics corrects error in financial results, Median OS should be 5.7 months, not 1.7.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, Cosmos Health achieved improved financial performance with adjusted profitability. The company saw a substantial increase in gross profit by 54% and managed to reduce cash burn by 95%. These positive trends have brought Cosmos Health closer to breaking even, indicating a more stable financial outlook for the company moving forward.
news.headline: Cosmos Health Q1 2025: Gross profit up 54% to $2.05M, cash burn reduced 95% to $0.19M, approaching breakeven.

news.summary: In the city of Medina, Ohio, Fire-Dex, an esteemed provider of personal protective equipment for first responders worldwide, has revealed the appointment of a new Chief Executive Officer and President, selected internally.
news.headline: Fire-Dex appoints Lauren Burke DeVere as CEO and John Karban as President, continuing their legacy in leading PPE for first responders.

news.summary: According to a report by AMLBot, the multi-signature arrangement used by Tether to freeze funds presents a significant opportunity for illegal actors to exploit.
news.headline: Since 2017, $78M lost due to a loophole in Tether's freezing method; AMLBot report highlights vulnerability in their setup.

news.summary: Caro Holdings has revealed plans for a new partnership with the petcare brand Animoat, aiming to take charge of digital marketing strategies and enhance their presence on Amazon for increased sales.
news.headline: Caro Holdings partners with Animoat to boost distribution of pet bowls, focusing on digital marketing and Amazon sales.

news.summary: Simon Persson, the Chief Financial Officer at Serstech, is set to go on parental leave from June 1 to October 31, 2025. In his absence, Michael Sandin will step in as the interim CFO.
news.headline: Simon Persson, CFO of Serstech to go on parental leave June 1-Oct 31, 2025. Michael Sandin named interim CFO.

news.summary: The Baltic Horizon Fund's net asset value (NAV) per unit experienced a decrease to EUR 0.6740 by the end of April 2025, down from EUR 0.6769 at the end of March 2025. The total net asset value for the Fund at the end of April was EUR 96.8 million, compared to EUR 97.2 million as of 31 March 2025. This slight decrease in NAV was primarily due to a drop in the fair value of derivative financial instruments and expenses related to an early partial bond redemption. As of 30 April 2025, the EPRA NRV per unit was reported at EUR 0.7200.
news.headline: Baltic Horizon Fund's NAV dropped in April 2025 to EUR 0.6740 per unit, total NAV at EUR 96.8M. DERIV decrease and bond expenses cited. EPRA NRV at EUR 0.7200/unit.

news.summary: Today, in Montreal, CN revealed its capital expenditures plan for 2025, demonstrating its dedication to expanding capacity, improving safety, and fostering sustainable growth throughout its North American operations. The company is set to allocate around $3.4 billion CAD toward various capital projects in the current year, excluding customer reimbursements.
news.headline: CN to invest $3.4 billion in 2025 for capacity, safety, and sustainable growth in North America.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Allied Properties REIT (TSX:AP.UN) disclosed that its Trustees have approved a distribution of $0.15 per unit for May 2025, totaling $1.80 annually per unit. The payment is scheduled for June 16, 2025, for unitholders listed as of May 30, 2025.
news.headline: Allied Properties REIT declares $0.15 per unit distribution for May 2025, totaling $1.80 per unit annually. Payable on June 16 to unitholders.

news.summary: Montreal-headquartered company Saputo is set to announce its fiscal 2025 fourth quarter and full-year financial results on Thursday, June 5, 2025. Following the market close, a press release will be issued with a conference call scheduled for the next day, June 6, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) to analyze the performance. Leading the call will be Mr. Carl Colizza, the President and CEO, alongside Mr. Maxime Therrien, CFO and Secretary.
news.headline: Saputo Inc. to report fiscal 2025 Q4 and year-end results on June 5, 2025, followed by a conference call on June 6 at 8:00 a.m. ET with President, CEO, and CFO.

news.summary: A new report from blockchain compliance firm AMLBot revealed that a lag in Tether's wallet blacklisting process allowed over $78 million in illicit funds to be moved before enforcement actions were taken. The delay in Tether's address blacklisting process is due to its multisignature contract setup on both Ethereum and Tron. The process involves two transactions: the first warns of the impending blacklisting, and the second confirms it. This delay provides a window of opportunity for illicit actors to move or launder funds before the freeze takes effect. On the Ethereum blockchain, over $28.5 million in USDT was withdrawn during the delay, with an average amount exceeding $365,000. Similarly, $49.6 million was moved on the Tron blockchain, resulting in a total of $78.1 million. Exploiting this delay on Tron was not uncommon, with 170 out of 3,480 wallets exploiting the lag. Tether, Tron, and TRM Labs had cooperated in 2024 to freeze over $126 million in USDT tied to illicit activities, but the report brings to light concerns about the speed and effectiveness of these enforcement actions.
news.headline: $78M in illicit funds moved due to delay in Tether's $USDT blacklist process, says report. Delay allows for freeze avoidance up to $365,000 per transfer.

news.summary: The construction waste market is experiencing significant growth, fueled by strict government regulations, increasing green building certifications, urbanization trends, and advancements in waste sorting and recycling technologies. A recent market research report revealed these factors driving expansion. The report, titled "Construction Waste Outlook 2025," forecasts a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.5% over the next five years. This growth is attributed to the emphasis on sustainability practices in the construction industry, leading to increased demand for efficient waste management solutions. The market is expected to reach a value of $2.5 billion by 2025. Key drivers include the need to reduce landfill waste, minimize environmental impact, and comply with waste disposal regulations. The adoption of innovative technologies for waste segregation and recycling is projected to further propel market growth.
news.headline: Construction Waste Management Market to hit $97.2B by 2032, with a 5.6% CAGR from 2025, driven by government regulations and technology.

news.summary: For over three years of development and testing 25 protein sources to achieve ideal flavor and texture, a new yogurt has been launched, offering a significant protein source. Recently, Forager Project, a renowned provider of organic dairy-free products, unveiled this innovative yogurt in San Francisco on May 15, 2025.
news.headline: Forager Project launches dairy-free Greek yogurt with 10g protein after 3 years, testing 25 sources for flavor.

news.summary: An initial one-year pilot contract has been awarded by the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs to Cabana, based in Annapolis, Maryland. The pilot program combines VA's Mission Daybreak and SSG Fox Grant initiatives to offer personalized and adaptable support outside of conventional healthcare settings. This partnership aims to cater to veterans' needs more effectively by providing private and flexible assistance. The program is set to operate through at least May 15, 2026.
news.headline: Cabana and VA partners for a pilot to offer anonymous support for veterans through community partners outside healthcare settings.

news.summary: In the latest guide, it is detailed how top marketers are leveraging advanced attribution strategies to translate digital advertisements into tangible outcomes. Orange 142, a segment of Direct Digital Holdings traded on the NASDAQ under DRCT, known for their expertise in digital marketing is behind this initiative. news.summary: World Liberty Financial, an decentralized finance project associated with the Trump family, has been through a turbulent time with its cryptocurrency investments, reflecting the unpredictable nature of the market. The firm, highlighted for its high-profile endorsement, maintains a diversified portfolio of digital assets. Recent market surges have brought some tokens into positive territory, while others are still struggling. The portfolio consists of 10 cryptocurrency assets, with four tokens showing gains since acquisition. The top performer is SEI, which has soared by over 67%, demonstrating robust performance in the recovering crypto market. Additional assets showing gains include SUI and TRX. For more details, access the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: World Liberty Financial, linked to Trump, sees fluctuation in crypto investments. Portfolio of 10 assets includes SEI up by 67% amid market volatility.

news.summary: RBC Bearings is set to announce its quarterly earnings, with analysts predicting an EPS of $2.70. Investors are eager to see if the company surpasses estimates and provides positive guidance for the next quarter, as market reactions are often driven by guidance rather than just earnings performance. In the previous quarter, RBC Bearings exceeded EPS by $0.14, resulting in a 0.0% drop in share price the next day. The stock was trading at $364.46 on May 14, with a 26.75% increase in the last 52 weeks. Analysts have given RBC Bearings a consensus Buy rating with an average one-year price target of $375.0, suggesting a potential 2.89% upside.
news.headline: RBC Bearings (RBC) to release Q1 earnings on 2025-05-16, EPS estimated at $2.70. Historical performance includes beat of $0.14 last quarter. Stock at $364.46, up 26.75% in 52-week period. Analysts give RBC 1 Buy rating with $375.0 price target for potential 2.89% upside. (Word count: 55)

news.summary: A seasoned professional with 30 years of experience in supply chain management has been selected to spearhead growth and innovation for Nulogy's external manufacturing sector. news.headline: ALS Network and Livermore Lab Foundation receive research funds for analyzing medication effects on ALS and Parkinson's. Los Angeles, May 15, 2025.
